title: apimap clients.yaml
description: Schema for clients/apimap (https://github.com/theizzatbek/gokit/tree/main/clients/apimap) outbound HTTP YAML definitions. Add `# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/theizzatbek/gokit/main/schemas/clients.schema.json` to the top of your clients.yaml.

clients.description: Upstream API definitions. Each entry compiles into a goroutine-safe `apimap` Client keyed by `<client>.<endpoint>`.

name.description: Stable client identifier. Used in apimap_requests_total{client=…} and as the first half of the routing key.

base_url.description: Absolute URL the per-endpoint `path` is appended to. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution at Load.

timeout.description: Per-request timeout as a Go duration string (e.g. "10s"). Becomes `clients/httpc.Config.Timeout` for this client's http.Client.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts on transient failures. 0 = httpc default (3); -1 = disable retries. Honored only for idempotent methods (POST/PATCH never retry).

backoff_base.description: Exponential-backoff base as a Go duration string. Empty = httpc default.

backoff_max.description: Exponential-backoff ceiling as a Go duration string. Empty = httpc default.

default_headers.description: Headers applied to every request issued through this client. Per-endpoint headers override on collision.

name.description: Endpoint identifier, scoped to the parent client. Combined into the `<client>.<endpoint>` routing key. Per-endpoint Code in *errs.Error uses slugified form (e.g. `apimap_github_get_user_not_found`).

path.description: Path appended to the client's base_url. May contain `{placeholders}` resolved per-call via apimap.Call.Path values.

encode.description: Request body encoding. `none` (default) = no body, `json` = JSON-marshal, `form` = urlencode, `raw` = pass []byte verbatim.

decode.description: Response body decoding. `json` powers apimap.Decode[T]; `raw` returns []byte; `none` discards.

headers.description: Per-endpoint headers. Override the client's default_headers on key collision.

timeout.description: Per-endpoint timeout override (Go duration). Any of timeout / max_retries / backoff_* set here forces a dedicated *http.Client for this endpoint.

max_retries.description: Per-endpoint retry override. See client.max_retries for semantics.

type.description: Auth shape applied to every request issued through this client. `none` is the default when the auth block is omitted.

then.description: Hands control to a Go-side WithAuthBuilder. The block accepts arbitrary keys forwarded as args.

breaker.description: Optional circuit breaker. When set, an upstream that crosses the failure threshold is shorted for `open_interval` before half-open probing.

failure_threshold.description: Failure ratio in (0,1] over the rolling window that opens the breaker.

minimum_requests.description: Floor on requests-per-window before the ratio is evaluated.

window_duration.description: Rolling window length as a Go duration (e.g. "30s").

window_size.description: Number of buckets the rolling window is divided into.

open_interval.description: Open-state duration before transitioning to half-open.

half_open_max_probes.description: Max concurrent probe requests permitted while half-open.

max_concurrent.description: Hard ceiling on in-flight requests for this client.

max_queue.description: Waiting-room slots beyond max_concurrent. 0 = no queue, callers shed on saturation.

queue_timeout.description: Max time a queued request may wait before failing fast (Go duration).
